channel.title: WorldAML Insights
channel.description: Practical AML, KYC/KYB, sanctions and regulatory compliance analysis from the WorldAML team.

item.title: LexisNexis WorldCompliance vs LSEG World-Check: A 2026 Comparison
item.description: Side-by-side comparison of LexisNexis WorldCompliance and LSEG World-Check across coverage, refresh frequency, PEP depth, adverse media, integration and pricing — and how WorldAML packages WorldCompliance for live, API-first screening.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Research Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Research Team

item.title: AML for Real Estate Agents: Obligations, Red Flags, and Compliance Workflows
item.description: Real estate is one of the highest-risk sectors for money laundering. This guide covers AML obligations for estate agents, property transaction red flags, CDD requirements, and how to build a compliant onboarding workflow.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: PSD2 and Open Banking: AML Obligations for Third-Party Providers
item.description: PSD2 opened payment markets to new entrants — but it also extended AML obligations to Account Information Service Providers (AISPs) and Payment Initiation Service Providers (PISPs). This guide explains what is required.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: DORA Regulation: What Financial Institutions Need to Know About Digital Operational Resilience
item.description: The EU's Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) came into force in January 2025. This guide explains DORA's requirements for financial institutions, the intersection with AML and cybersecurity, and how to build a compliant ICT risk management framework.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: The FATF Travel Rule Explained: Obligations for VASPs and Financial Institutions
item.description: A practical explainer on the FATF Travel Rule — what information must travel with wire transfers and crypto transactions, which firms are affected, and how to achieve compliance.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: AML Compliance for Crypto Exchanges and VASPs: 2025 Regulatory Guide
item.description: A complete guide to AML/CFT obligations for cryptocurrency exchanges and Virtual Asset Service Providers — covering FATF Travel Rule, MiCA, FinCEN requirements, and best-practice compliance frameworks.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: iGaming AML Obligations: What Online Gambling Operators Must Do
item.description: A practical guide to AML compliance for online gambling and iGaming operators — covering customer due diligence, source of funds checks, transaction monitoring, and the EU and UK regulatory frameworks.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: AML Compliance Checklist for Financial Institutions in 2025
item.description: A practical, step-by-step AML compliance checklist covering risk assessments, CDD, transaction monitoring, and SAR filing — updated for 2025 regulatory requirements.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: MLRO Responsibilities and Obligations: A Complete Guide for Money Laundering Reporting Officers
item.description: Everything a Money Laundering Reporting Officer (MLRO) needs to know — legal obligations, SAR filing duties, governance responsibilities, and how to build a defensible compliance function.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: Transaction Monitoring Red Flags: 25 Indicators of Suspicious Activity
item.description: A reference guide to the most important transaction monitoring red flags for AML compliance — covering structuring, layering, high-risk geography indicators, and sector-specific patterns.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: KYC vs KYB: Key Differences and Why Both Matter
item.description: Understand the critical differences between Know Your Customer (KYC) and Know Your Business (KYB) verification, and why regulated organisations need both to manage onboarding risk.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: EDD vs SDD: When to Apply Enhanced or Simplified Due Diligence
item.description: A clear guide to Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) and Simplified Due Diligence (SDD) — when each applies, what steps are required, and how to document your decisions to satisfy regulators.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: Sanctions Screening Best Practices: Reducing False Positives Without Increasing Risk
item.description: How to tune your sanctions screening programme to minimise false positives, maintain regulatory defensibility, and ensure no genuine hit goes undetected.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: Adverse Media Screening: Why Negative News Checks Are Essential for AML
item.description: A comprehensive guide to adverse media screening in AML compliance — what it is, why it matters, how to implement it, and what the regulators expect.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: The Risk-Based Approach to AML: A Practical Implementation Guide
item.description: Learn how to implement a FATF-compliant risk-based approach to AML compliance — from business risk assessments to customer risk scoring and resource allocation.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: FATCA and CRS Reporting: Obligations for Financial Institutions
item.description: A practical guide to FATCA and Common Reporting Standard (CRS) compliance — who must report, what information is required, key deadlines, and how to avoid the most common reporting failures.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: Beneficial Ownership Verification: Regulatory Requirements and Practical Steps
item.description: A comprehensive guide to beneficial ownership identification and verification — covering EU 6AMLD, UK MLRs, FATF standards, and how to operationalise UBO checks at scale.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team

item.title: PEP Screening Guide: Who Are PEPs and How to Screen Them Effectively
item.description: Everything compliance teams need to know about Politically Exposed Persons (PEPs) — definitions, risk categories, screening requirements, and how to manage PEP relationships under EU, UK, and FATF standards.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team
